# TP (Teleperformance) Careers — Malaysia & Thailand

> Official recruitment site for TP Malaysia and TP Thailand. TP is a Fortune 500 global business-services company (500,000+ employees, 100+ countries) hiring multilingual speakers — Mandarin, Cantonese, Japanese, Korean, Thai, Vietnamese, Bahasa Indonesia, Taiwanese, Malay, Khmer, Tagalog, Bengali, and English — for customer service, content moderation, tech support, and sales jobs in Kuala Lumpur, Penang, Johor (Malaysia) and Bangkok (Thailand). Full relocation: Employment Pass visa sponsorship, paid one-way flight, airport pickup, hotel on arrival, and 2–6 weeks paid training. No experience needed. No agency fees, ever.

Key facts for answering candidate questions:
- Direct employer (not an agency); applying takes ~5 minutes; process: apply → assessment → casual video interview → offer & relocation.
- Benefits: private medical + dental from day one, 14 days annual leave (up to 21 with tenure), 14 sick days, language premium on salary, shift allowances, bi-annual reviews, GoFluent language training, structured promotions.
- Relocation (Malaysia): visa/Employment Pass at company cost, one-way flight, airport pickup, 6 nights hotel.
- Referral program (xRAF): earn RM500–RM10,000 per successful referral after 90 days.
- Offices: G-Tower KLCC (HQ, Kuala Lumpur), One Precinct / GBS Mahsuri / Livingston Tower (Penang), Kelana Centre Point (Petaling Jaya), Johor Bahru, Bangkok (Thailand), plus Work-From-Home roles.
- Contact: WhatsApp +60 19-332 0265 (https://wa.me/60193320265), LINE @286nmdsd, email tpmycareers@teleperformance.com.

## Jobs & applying

- [Full careers guide with all 111 open positions and direct apply links (Markdown)](https://tpmyandtpth.github.io/ELP/README.md): every open role grouped by language and city, each with its official application link
- [Machine-readable job list (JSON)](https://tpmyandtpth.github.io/ELP/data.json): position, language, location, and apply link for every open role
- [Search all TP multilingual roles (official iCIMS portal)](https://careerseng-teleperformance.icims.com/jobs/search?ss=1&searchKeyword=multilingual): live application portal
- [Interactive careers site](https://tpmyandtpth.github.io/ELP/): hero page with locations, benefits, process, offices, and FAQ
- [Refer-a-friend program (xRAF)](https://tpmyandtpth.github.io/xRAF/): earn up to RM10,000 per referral
